mapper.sql: id, project_id, username, vcd, vlabel, nci_codelist_code, type, terminology, comment, cdnum, code, nci_term_code, code_des, origin, code_ver, flag, sort_order, created_time, updated_time, created_by, updated_by
mapper.update: UPDATE sas_codelist_data SET vcd = #{vcd}, vlabel = #{vlabel}, nci_codelist_code = #{nciCodelistCode}, type = #{type}, terminology = #{terminology}, comment = #{comment}, cdnum = #{cdnum}, code = #{code}, nci_term_code = #{nciTermCode}, code_des = #{codeDes}, origin = #{origin}, code_ver = #{codeVer}, flag = #{flag}, sort_order = #{sortOrder}, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM sas_codelist_data WHERE project_id = #{projectId} AND username = #{username}
mapper.select: SELECT FROM sas_codelist_data WHERE project_id = #{projectId} AND username = #{username} ORDER BY sort_order ASC

update.foreach: UPDATE sas_codelist_data SET sort_order = #{item.sortOrder} WHERE id = #{item.id}

mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT vcd FROM sas_codelist_data WHERE project_id = #{projectId} AND username = #{username} ORDER BY vcd
